dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses SMA crossover (short-term crosses long-term). Mapped to sma_10 (short-term, within 3-25 day range) and sma_20 (long-term, within 5-50 day range). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: crosses_above triggers long entries and short exits; crosses_below triggers short entries and long exits. Exit conditions implemented as reversals per AUTHOR_SILENT rule. Target regime set to TRENDING per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses SMA crossover (short-term crosses long-term). Mapped to sma_10 (short-term, within 3-25 day range) and sma_20 (long-term, within 5-50 day range). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: crosses_above triggers long entries and short exits; crosses_below triggers short entries and long exits. Exit conditions implemented as reversals per AUTHOR_SILENT rule. Target regime set to TRENDING per signal specification.

source_rule_text: Enter a crossover trade when the short-term simple moving average crosses the longer-term simple moving average.
